checks.observed: Landing showed 30 questions, 40 minutes, pass mark 26, start button, and empty-then-populated history.
Exam run had data-total=30 and zero data-correct attributes before submission.
Answered counter incremented to 5; prev/next navigation preserved selections across slides.
Timer started near 40:00 and decreased monotonically (40:00 -> 39:53 -> 39:50).
Submit with 25 unanswered raised localized confirm; dismiss returned to run without submitting.
POST /api/exam returned 1/30 with fail verdict matching score < 26.
History listed new attempt 1/30 with date; best score 1/30.
Home readiness card showed מוכנות נמוכה 5% based on latest simulation.
Timer and answered counter are readable text; options have accessible names; headings on each page.
Exam Hebrew copy and timer digits rendered without raw keys or direction breakage.

limitations: Final submission carried 5 answered questions after confirm-dialog test; score 1/30 reflects partial answers.
